The user wants me to look at the styling of other components in the project and then implement the `basic.css` for the collapsible component, matching the project's theme. They want me to use UnoCSS for icons. Let me first look at the current file and then examine other component styles to understand the pattern.  Let me see the collapsible.css to understand what it imports and how the collapsible component is structured, along with some other component examples for styling patterns.Now let me look at the collapsible component's data attributes and source, plus a few more reference styles:
